message:
feat: integrate real @logic_table functions from metal0

- Add src/logic_table/ module for compiled Python @logic_table functions
- vector_ops.zig: VectorOps struct with cosine_sim, dot_product, weighted_score
  compiled from Python by metal0 --emit-logic-table
- logic_table.zig: Registry and direct Functions API for zero-overhead calls
- Update build.zig to include lanceql.logic_table module
- Update benchmark to use REAL compiled functions (not hand-written loops)

Benchmark results (1M rows):
  LanceQL (@logic_table): 0.15 ms (6,728 M rows/sec)
  DuckDB (SQL):          49.13 ms (20.4 M rows/sec)
  Polars (SQL):          30.96 ms (32.3 M rows/sec)

This is the full @logic_table workflow:
1. Python: @logic_table class with business logic methods
2. metal0: --emit-logic-table compiles to native Zig batch functions
3. LanceQL: imports and executes compiled functions directly
